creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to martin.dieringer from comment #2)

multimedia/avidemux is the master port; it builds the common components used by the avidemux frontends.

At the moment, we have those two frontends:
multimedia/avidemux-cli
multimedia/avidemux-qt4

You don't have to build/install multimedia/avidemux itself. It gets pulled in as dependency when you install either of the frontends.
